The Learning Benchmarking Tool concept, including the KPI framework, synthetic dataset design, and dashboard blueprint, has been developed within the DIiA context for Business Monitor. Ownership and licensing arrangements should ensure that Business Monitor can further develop and commercialize the tool, while acknowledging the contribution of the project team and academic partners.

## Operational and Financial Considerations

From an operational perspective, the reliance on Power BI and standard Python libraries lowers adoption barriers. Many potential clients already use similar environments, which reduces the need for bespoke infrastructure. Financial feasibility depends primarily on the ability to recruit a sufficient number of participating organizations to generate meaningful benchmarks and to support a subscription-based model. The proof of concept indicates that the technical and methodological components do not pose disproportionate costs.

# Teamwork

## Team Roles and Contributions

The project was executed by Team 5, bringing together complementary expertise in data engineering, synthetic data generation, analytics, dashboard development, and business analysis. Responsibilities were deliberately distributed to ensure a coherent end-to-end workflow.

**Gilbert Laanen** led the design, generation, and validation of the synthetic datasets and schema, and implemented the Python-based analytical components, including the correlation heatmap and the dynamic KPI scenario model. He also ensured the technical reproducibility and integration of the modelling pipeline within Power BI.

**Rick de Rijk** focused on KPI operationalisation and DAX implementation, translating conceptual evaluation constructs into measurable indicators. He contributed to the construction of the KPI framework and supported dashboard integration across the four Kirkpatrick levels.

**Stefan Vonk** contributed to the predictive modelling design, review of analytical validity, and interpretation of modelling outputs. He supported the alignment between methodological choices and stakeholder needs, ensuring theoretical consistency across analytical components.

**Tycho van Rooij** supported the user experience design and the structuring of dashboard interactions. He contributed to the layout, visual coherence, and interpretation text across the MVP, ensuring usability for HR and L&D stakeholders.

**Thom Verzantvoort** contributed to business analysis, consolidation of stakeholder feedback, and refinement of the value proposition and business model. He ensured alignment between technical outputs and the organisational feasibility requirements of the intended service.

Together, the team delivered a technically coherent and conceptually grounded Minimum Viable Product that integrates synthetic data, standardized KPIs, analytical modelling, and business insights into a unified solution.

## Collaboration Process

The team organized its work following the logic of CRISP-DM and iterative product development. Phases of business understanding, data understanding, and design were followed by technical implementation and evaluation cycles. Regular meetings with Business Monitor and academic supervisors ensured alignment with expectations and allowed timely adjustments, such as transitioning from an earlier Learn–Perform–Return framing to full adoption of the Kirkpatrick model.

## Reflection on Team Dynamics

The collaborative process was characterized by shared ownership and continuous refinement. The integration of methodological rigor, client relevance, and technical feasibility required coordinated effort, which the team achieved through transparent task allocation, documentation, and version control. This approach contributed to a coherent final deliverable.

# Conclusion

The Learning Benchmarking Tool demonstrates that it is both technically feasible and conceptually sound to design a benchmarking solution for learning programs that is grounded in Kirkpatrick’s four-level model and aligned with contemporary expectations for evidence-based HR and L&D decision-making. The use of synthetic data has enabled rigorous testing of schema design, KPI logic, and modeling components without compromising privacy or confidentiality.

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-Kirkpatrick-levels
%%| fig-cap: "Conceptual representation of the Kirkpatrick levels integrated into the Learning Benchmarking Tool."
%%| out-width: "60%"
%%| fig-align: "center"

%%{init: {
"flowchart": {
"useMaxWidth": true,
"nodeSpacing": 10,
"rankSpacing": 20,
"diagramPadding": 8,
"padding": 4,
"htmlLabels": true,
"curve": "curved"
},
"themeVariables": { "fontSize": "9px" }
}}%%

graph LR
    R[Reaction<br/>Satisfaction, Coherence,<br/>Trainer Quality] --> L[Learning<br/>Knowledge Gain,<br/>Confidence, Motivation]
    L --> B[Behavior<br/>Skill Application,<br/>Job Alignment, Coaching]
    B --> Re[Results<br/>ROI, Retention,<br/>Productivity, NIS]
    style R fill:#f7f7f7,stroke:#888
    style L fill:#f7f7f7,stroke:#888
    style B fill:#f7f7f7,stroke:#888
    style Re fill:#f7f7f7,stroke:#888

```

The proof of concept confirms that standardized KPIs, clear mapping to evaluation levels, and interpretable driver analyses can be combined into a practical decision-support environment for organizations. At the same time, the findings underline that meaningful benchmarking requires consistent, high-quality input data, thoughtful governance, and careful communication of limitations.

Future work should focus on staged pilots with real organizations, validation of KPI distributions against empirical data, and incremental extension of the tool’s functionality where it adds explanatory power without sacrificing transparency. By following this pathway, Business Monitor can position itself as a credible provider of learning benchmarking insights that help organizations make better informed, evidence-based investment decisions.

\newpage

# Appendix A – Synthetic Dataset Overview

This appendix documents the structure of the LPBT_synthetic_v3 dataset on which the proof of concept is based. The dataset is designed so that it can be replaced by real organisational data without requiring changes to the analytical logic, data model, or dashboard structures.

The dataset consists of seven tables that together form the modelling environment for the Learning Benchmarking Tool. Each table has a defined analytical role, a clear granularity level, and a set of linking variables that is used within Power BI.

::: {#tbl-table5 tbl-cap="Overview of main tables in LPBT_synthetic_v3." tbl-colwidths="[12, 12, 22, 22, 22]"}
+------------------------+---------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Table Name             | Granularity                                 | Key Variables                                                                                                                                                        | Purpose                                                                                                                                           | Relation to Other Tables                                                                                                |

| synthetic_programs     | Program-level, one row per training program | record_id, Year, training_type_code, satisfaction_likert, knowledge_gain_pct, apply_likert, participation_mandatory, attendance_rate_pct, duration_hours, total_cost | Contains program design characteristics, operational measures, and outcome indicators used across L1–L3 dashboards and the Results dashboard.     | Joined to synthetic_participants via record_id = course_id; linked to dim_course_type via training_type_code.           |
+------------------------+---------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| synthetic_participants | Participant-level, many rows per program    | cursist_id, doeltaal, course_id, branch_code, location_code, manager_support_likert, promotion_flag, nis_overall_impact_likert                                       | Includes participant responses, behavioural indicators, contextual information, and the L4 impact rating used to compute the Net Impact Score.    | Linked to synthetic_programs via course_id; connected to dim_branch and dim_location via branch_code and location_code. |
+------------------------+---------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| dim_branch             | Sector or industry reference                | branch_code, branch_name                                                                                                                                             | Provides standardised branch labels for filtering and sector-based comparisons.                                                                   | Linked to synthetic_participants via branch_code.                                                                       |
+------------------------+---------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| dim_location           | Geographic reference                        | location_code, location_name                                                                                                                                         | Provides location labels that support geographic comparisons and segmentation.                                                                    | Linked to synthetic_participants via location_code.                                                                     |
+------------------------+---------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| dim_course_type        | Course-type reference                       | course_type_code, training_type                                                                                                                                      | Standardises program categories and supports aggregation across training types.                                                                   | Linked to synthetic_programs via training_type_code.                                                                    |
+------------------------+---------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| kpi_mapping            | KPI metadata table                          | kpi, description, status, Kirkpatrick’s level, type, unit, domain, formula                                                                                           | Defines the calculation logic, Kirkpatrick classification, and benchmark domain for each KPI, allowing consistent categorisation within Power BI. | Used as a metadata layer for dynamic KPI grouping and reporting.                                                        |
+------------------------+---------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| data_dictionary        | Meta-level documentation                    | dataset, variable, type, unit, purpose, recommended_filter                                                                                                           | Documents the variables included in the dataset and clarifies their analytical role, supporting reproducibility and data governance.              | Documentation table for analysts and implementers.                                                                      |
+------------------------+---------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

: Overview of main tables in LPBT_synthetic_v3.
:::

The full technical specification, including all variables and field definitions, is maintained in the project files and can be reused as a template for future data collection and integration.

\newpage

# Appendix B – KPI Mapping to Kirkpatrick Levels

Appendix B provides the detailed mapping of all KPIs used in the dashboards and prediction model to the four Kirkpatrick levels. For each KPI, it records the definition, formula, source variables, and intended interpretation in the context of benchmarking.

::: {#tbl-table4 tbl-cap="Overview of KPI Mapping to Kirkpatrick Levels." tbl-colwidths="[8, 16, 64]"}
+-------------------+-------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Kirkpatrick Level | Focus                               | Example KPIs                                                                                             |
+:==================+:====================================+:=========================================================================================================+
| Reaction (L1)     | Experience and satisfaction         | Satisfaction, Trainer Effectiveness, Goal Achievement, Program Coherence, Manager Support                |
+-------------------+-------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Learning (L2)     | Knowledge and confidence            | Knowledge Gain, Motivation Apply, Confidence, Learning Transfer Readiness, Learning Engagement           |
+-------------------+-------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Behavior (L3)     | Application and transfer            | Skill Rate, Applicability, Job Alignment, Follow-up Coaching, Professional Relevance                     |
+-------------------+-------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Results (L4)      | Organizational and financial impact | ROI Ratio, NIS, NPS, Productivity Impact, Retention Improvement, Employee Engagement, Benchmark Position |
+-------------------+-------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

: Overview of KPI Mapping to Kirkpatrick Levels.
:::

This mapping ensures methodological transparency and supports consistent implementation when real data are introduced.

\newpage

# Appendix C – Data Dictionary

Appendix C contains the complete data dictionary for the synthetic datasets, including variable names, descriptions, datatypes, and units. It is derived from the Synthetic Data Generation documentation and the LPBT_synthetic_v3 workbook.

::: {#tbl-table3 tbl-cap="Overview of Data Dictionary." tbl-colwidths="[10, 10, 10, 50, 10]"}
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| Dataset                | Variable                      | Type    | Purpose                                                                                                                                | Filter |
+:=======================+:==============================+:========+:=======================================================================================================================================+:=======+
| synthetic_programs     | record_id                     | integer | Unique identifier to join, audit, and de-duplicate records across sheets.                                                              | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | year                          | integer | The year in which the learning is provided                                                                                             | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | training_type_code            | string  | Standardized code to group courses for reporting and benchmarking by program type.                                                     | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | learning_objectives           | string  | Captures expected outcomes to align evaluation metrics with intended skills/behavior.                                                  | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | delivery_format               | string  | Classifies modality (online, classroom, blended) to analyze effectiveness by format.                                                   | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | duration_hours                | float   | Measures training intensity to relate time investment to outcomes.                                                                     | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | design_quality_index          | float   | Composite indicator of instructional design quality to explain outcome variance.                                                       | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | trainer_to_participant_ratio  | float   | Proxy for instructional attention, used to study engagement and completion.                                                            | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | invitations                   | integer | Denominator for participation metrics to assess program reach.                                                                         | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | follow_up_coaching_likert     | integer | Flags after-care interventions to evaluate their role in skill transfer.                                                               | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | seniority_level               | string  | Segments learners by experience level to control for baseline skill differences.                                                       | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | department_function           | string  | Links programs to business units to enable function-level impact analyses.                                                             | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | opportunity_to_apply_likert   | float   | Measures real-world chances to use learned skills, a key transfer enabler.                                                             | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | participation_mandatory       | integer | Distinguishes compliance-driven vs voluntary learning to interpret satisfaction and completion.                                        | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | attendance_rate_pct           | float   | Share of sessions attended, used as an engagement and data-quality control variable.                                                   | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | completion_rate_pct           | float   | Share finishing assessments or modules, core indicator of program adherence.                                                           | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | baseline_performance_index    | float   | Pre-training performance proxy to control for regression-to-the-mean and selection.                                                    | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | retention_baseline_pct        | float   | Pre-program retention level to benchmark post-program changes.                                                                         | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | pre_confidence                | float   | Learner self-efficacy before training to estimate growth relative to starting point.                                                   | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | post_confidence               | float   | Learner self-efficacy after training to quantify perceived gains.                                                                      | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | self_assessed_readiness       | float   | Learner’s perceived job-readiness to predict on-the-job application.                                                                   | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | pre_test_score                | float   | Objective knowledge/skill before training for learning gain analyses.                                                                  | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | post_test_score               | float   | Objective knowledge/skill after training to compute learning gains.                                                                    | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | promotions_or_transfers       | integer | Career mobility events used as longer-term outcome indicators.                                                                         | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | output_before                 | float   | Baseline productivity to compare pre/post operational performance.                                                                     | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | output_after                  | float   | Post-training productivity to estimate operational impact.                                                                             | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | retention_before              | float   | Employee retention before the program to serve as baseline.                                                                            | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | retention_after               | float   | Employee retention after the program to detect retention changes.                                                                      | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | total_benefit                 | float   | Monetized benefits used for ROI and payback calculations.                                                                              | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | total_cost                    | float   | All-in program costs to compute cost-effectiveness and ROI.                                                                            | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | organization_kpi_value        | float   | Client’s own KPI value for context and alignment with business targets.                                                                | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | benchmark_average             | float   | External or cross-program average to benchmark performance levels.                                                                     | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | satisfaction_likert           | integer | Learner satisfaction as a quality signal of the learning experience.                                                                   | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | goal_achievement_likert       | float   | Extent to which personal/program goals were met to assess perceived effectiveness.                                                     | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | applicability_likert          | integer | Perceived applicability on the job to predict transfer and business impact.                                                            | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | transfer_readiness_likert     | float   | Perceived readiness to apply skills, bridging learning to behavior change.                                                             | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | professional_relevance_likert | float   | Perceived relevance to the role to explain motivation and usage.                                                                       | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | trainer_quality_likert        | float   | Perceived trainer quality as a driver of engagement and learning outcomes.                                                             | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | program_coherence_likert      | float   | Perceived alignment and structure of content to explain completion and satisfaction.                                                   | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | motivation_apply_likert       | float   | Learner motivation to use skills, a predictor of real application.                                                                     | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | job_alignment_likert          | float   | Fit with job tasks to estimate likelihood of sustained use and impact.                                                                 | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | benchmark_ready               | integer | Enables slicing or excluding non-ready records in KPI calculations.                                                                    | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | cursist_id                    | string  | Join key to track multiple responses per learner and deduplicate.                                                                      | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | doeltaal                      | string  | Used to analyze language-specific outcomes and preferences.                                                                            | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | course_id                     | string  | Join key to link participant responses to program-level data.                                                                          | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | training_investment           | float   | Input for NIS and cost-effectiveness analyses.                                                                                         | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | total_hr_budget               | float   | Denominator for NIS (investment share) calculations.                                                                                   | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | location_code                 | string  | Enables geography-based benchmarking and logistics planning.                                                                           | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | branch_code                   | string  | Sector-level benchmarking and external comparisons.                                                                                    | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | manager_support_likert        | float   | Support provided by the trainee’s manager, used as a contextual driver for satisfaction, applicability, and transfer readiness.        | No     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_participants | promotion_flag                | integer | Provides information if the participant is promoted due to the training.                                                               | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| dim_course_type        | course_type_code              | string  | Surrogate key for course categories used in joins.                                                                                     | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| dim_course_type        | training_type                 | string  | Descriptive label for each training category.                                                                                          | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| dim_location           | location_code                 | string  | Surrogate key for location table joins.                                                                                                | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| dim_location           | location_name                 | string  | Descriptive location label used in dashboards and reports.                                                                             | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| dim_branch             | branch_code                   | string  | Surrogate key for sector/branch joins.                                                                                                 | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| dim_branch             | branch_name                   | string  | Descriptive sector label used for benchmark grouping.                                                                                  | Yes    |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | engagement_after              | float   | Stores one record per learning program, summarizing design, delivery, cost, and outcome indicators across the four Kirkpatrick levels. | no     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | engagement_before             | float   | Contains program-level variables that link design and context factors to standardized KPIs used in the dashboards.                     | no     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+
| synthetic_programs     | behavior_change_likert        | float   | Serves as a template for future real data, capturing program attributes and outcomes for benchmarking and KPI calculation.             | no     |
+------------------------+-------------------------------+---------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------+

: Overview of Data Dictionary.
:::

The data dictionary is intended to function as a blueprint for organizations that wish to align their internal evaluation instruments and databases with the Learning Benchmarking Tool, ensuring that future benchmarking exercises can be conducted on a consistent and comparable basis.

\newpage

# Appendix D – KPI Table and Formulas

This appendix provides the complete overview of Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) implemented in the Learning Program Benchmarking Tool (LPBT).

\
Each KPI operationalizes a specific construct within Kirkpatrick’s evaluation model (Reaction, Learning, Behavior, or Results) and is linked to a formula that enables automated calculation in Power BI.\
Conceptual KPIs represent additional indicators under consideration for future data collection rounds.

::: {#tbl-table2 tbl-cap="Overview of KPI Table and Formulas." tbl-colwidths="[10, 23, 9, 9, 9, 30]"}
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| KPI                                     | Description                                                                                                                                                                     | Status     | Kirkpatrick Level | Unit              | Formula                                                                                                                                                                     |
+:========================================+:================================================================================================================================================================================+:===========+:==================+:==================+:============================================================================================================================================================================+
| applicability_kpi                       | Perceived applicability of the training to the job.                                                                                                                             | active     | Behavior          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(applicability_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                                     |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| behavior_change_kpi                     | Self- or manager-rated behavioral change.                                                                                                                                       | active     | Behavior          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(behavior_change_likert)                                                                                                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| benchmark_position_kpi                  | Relative position compared to external benchmark.                                                                                                                               | active     | Results           | \%                | (organization_kpi_value ÷ benchmark_average) × 100                                                                                                                          |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| collaboration_impact_kpi                | Perceived improvement in collaboration.                                                                                                                                         | conceptual | Behavior          | Likert 1–5        | average(collaboration_impact_likert)                                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| confidence_kpi                          | Average post-training confidence in applying learned skills.                                                                                                                    | active     | Learning          | Likert 1–5 → %    | AVERAGE(confidence_likert)                                                                                                                                                  |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| cost_per_course_type_kpi                | Average cost per participant per course type.                                                                                                                                   | conceptual | Baseline          | € per course type | (total_cost_course_type ÷ participants_course_type)                                                                                                                         |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| cost_per_location_kpi                   | Average cost per participant per location.                                                                                                                                      | conceptual | Baseline          | € per location    | (total_cost_location ÷ participants_location)                                                                                                                               |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| cost_per_participant_kpi                | Average investment per participant per program.                                                                                                                                 | conceptual | Baseline          | € per participant | (total_program_cost ÷ participants)                                                                                                                                         |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| cost_per_sector_kpi                     | Average cost per participant per sector.                                                                                                                                        | conceptual | Baseline          | € per sector      | (total_cost_sector ÷ participants_sector)                                                                                                                                   |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| customer_satisfaction_kpi               | Change in customer satisfaction post-training.                                                                                                                                  | conceptual | Results           | Δ%                | ((csat_after – csat_before) ÷ csat_before) × 100                                                                                                                            |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| digital_learning_readiness_kpi          | Readiness for digital and blended learning.                                                                                                                                     | conceptual | Cross             | Index             | index(access, skill, attitude)                                                                                                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| employee_engagement_Δ_kpi               | Change in employee engagement related to learning.                                                                                                                              | active     | Results           | Δ%                | ((engagement_after – engagement_before) ÷ engagement_before) × 100                                                                                                          |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| error_reduction\_/\_quality_improvement | Reduction in errors or quality improvement after learning.                                                                                                                      | conceptual | Results           | \%                | ((error_before – error_after) ÷ error_before) × 100                                                                                                                         |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| follow_up_coaching_kpi                  | Share of participants receiving post-training coaching.                                                                                                                         | active     | Behavior          | \%                | (follow_up_coaching_likert ÷ participants) × 100                                                                                                                            |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| goal_achievement_kpi                    | Perceived achievement of individual learning goals.                                                                                                                             | active     | Reaction          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(goal_achievement_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                                  |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| internal_mobility_kpi                   | Share of participants moving to new internal roles.                                                                                                                             | conceptual | Results           | \%                | (internal_moves ÷ total_participants) × 100                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| job_alignment_kpi                       | Degree to which content aligns with current tasks.                                                                                                                              | active     | Behavior          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(job_alignment_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                                     |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| knowledge_gain_kpi                      | Relative improvement in knowledge test scores.                                                                                                                                  | active     | Learning          | \%                | ((post_test_score – pre_test_score) ÷ pre_test_score) × 100                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| knowledge_retention_test_kpi            | Knowledge retained 4–6 weeks after training.                                                                                                                                    | conceptual | Learning          | \%                | ((delayed – pre) ÷ pre) × 100                                                                                                                                               |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| learner_satisfaction_kpi                | Overall satisfaction with the learning experience.                                                                                                                              | active     | Reaction          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(satisfaction_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                                      |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| learning_culture_kpi                    | Index of organizational learning culture and support.                                                                                                                           | conceptual | Cross             | Index             | composite_index(support, feedback, autonomy)                                                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| learning_engagement_kpi                 | Composite index = participation + completion + activity.                                                                                                                        | active     | Learning          | \% of max         | index(participation, completion)                                                                                                                                            |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| learning_relevance_kpi                  | Perceived relevance of learning content.                                                                                                                                        | conceptual | Reaction          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(learning_relevance_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| learning_roi_kpi                        | Estimated financial return on learning investment.                                                                                                                              | active     | Results           | Ratio → %         | (total_benefit ÷ total_cost)                                                                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| learning_transfer_readiness_kpi         | Readiness and perceived ability to transfer learning to the job.                                                                                                                | active     | Learning          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(transfer_readiness_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| manager_observation_kpi                 | Manager-rated performance improvement.                                                                                                                                          | conceptual | Behavior          | Likert 1–5        | average(manager_observation_score)                                                                                                                                          |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| manager_support_kpi                     | Manager support influencing transfer readiness.                                                                                                                                 | active     | Reaction          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(manager_support_likert)                                                                                                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| motivation_apply_kpi                    | Motivation to apply learned skills in practice.                                                                                                                                 | active     | Learning          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(motivation_apply_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                                  |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| nis_kpi                                 | Net investment share of HR budget allocated to learning.                                                                                                                        | active     | Results           | \%                | (Training Investment ÷ Total HR Budget) × 100                                                                                                                               |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| nps_satisfaction_kpi                    | Net Promoter Score derived from the balance of promoters and detractors.                                                                                                        | active     | Results           | \%                | (NPS_Promoters_Pct – NPS_Detractors_Pct) × 100                                                                                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| nps_experience_score                    | Composite experience score reflecting perceived quality of the learning intervention, based on weighted satisfaction, trainer quality, relevance, coherence, and job alignment. | N/A        | N/A               | float             | round(0.40 × satisfaction_likert + 0.20 × trainer_quality_likert + 0.20 × professional_relevance_likert + 0.10 × program_coherence_likert + 0.10 × job_alignment_likert, 0) |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| participation_rate_kpi                  | Share of invites that attended the program.                                                                                                                                     | active     | Baseline          | \%                | (participants ÷ invitations) × 100                                                                                                                                          |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| productivity_impact_kpi                 | Relative productivity improvement after the program.                                                                                                                            | active     | Results           | \%                | ((output_after – output_before) ÷ output_before) × 100                                                                                                                      |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| professional_relevance_kpi              | Perceived relevance for professional growth.                                                                                                                                    | active     | Behavior          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(professional_relevance_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                            |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| program_coherence_kpi                   | Perceived coherence and structure of the program.                                                                                                                               | active     | Reaction          | Likert 1–5 → %    | average(program_coherence_likert + 5) × 100                                                                                                                                 |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| program_net_promoter_score_kpi          | Likelihood to recommend the program (NPS).                                                                                                                                      | conceptual | Reaction          | NPS               | (%Promoters – %Detractors)                                                                                                                                                  |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| promotion_rate_kpi                      | Share of participants promoted or internally transferred.                                                                                                                       | active     | Results           | \%                | (promotions_or_transfers ÷ total_participants) × 100                                                                                                                        |
+-----------------------------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------------+-------------------+-------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
